name_en: Stone Pillar Lantern with Rebirth Wheel of Juo-do
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone pillar lantern (sekidō) fitted with a rebirth wheel (rinne-guruma) at Juo-do. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

description_en: A tangible cultural property, the main hall (honden) of Minazawa Hachimangu Shrine. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Stone Seated Jizo Bodhisattva of Ryushin-ji (Chicken-Tortoise Jizo)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone seated statue of the Jizo Bodhisattva at Ryushin-ji, known as the Chicken-Tortoise Jizo (Keiki Jizō). It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Roadside Deity Stone of Yamakami Tsukagoshi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a roadside guardian deity stone (dōsojin) at Yamakami Tsukagoshi. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

description_en: A tangible cultural property, the old documents (komonjo) of the Yoshida family. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

description_en: A tangible cultural property, stone statues of Yakushi Nyorai and the Kannon Bodhisattva at Hiromaji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

description_en: A tangible cultural property, the kabuki stage musicians' booth (geza) of Shinkawa. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

description_en: A tangible cultural property, the carved transoms (ranma) of the main hall of Iko-ji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
